title: Nada Bindu Upanishad: The Drop of Sound
description: From the Nada Bindu Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Nada Bindu Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: The syllable Om is the bow. The Self is the arrow. Brahman is the target. The target is to be hit by one whose mind is undistracted. Then, like the arrow, one becomes one with the target.
